description: fetcher.cr HEAD moved from 283326b4 to fab9dff5 since the last update (quickhea-a6t). Single commit refactor: moves with_cache body from CrestHttpClient shim into HeaderBuilder.with_cache, reduces CrestHttpClient.with_cache to a thin delegate. Public API unchanged. Test by running crystal spec and just nix-build, then merge.
title: Update fetcher.cr to upstream fab9dff5 (HeaderBuilder.with_cache refactor)
